lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You look tired, Finn. When's the last time you rested?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Rest is for people who think tomorrow brings something better. It doesn't.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Maybe not. But someone here will care if you collapse.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Only because they'd need the bed space. Still... I'll eat something.
